caption: The video features a man standing on a stage at an event hosted by the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop. He is dressed in a casual blazer over a checkered shirt and dark trousers. The man appears to be delivering a speech or presentation, using hand gestures to emphasize his points. In the first image, he raises his right hand, possibly to make a significant point or to engage with the audience. In the second image, his hands come together in front of him, suggesting a moment of reflection or transition in his speech. The setting suggests a formal yet approachable atmosphere, likely aimed at discussing topics related to peace and international relations.
